Notes: Single UPDATE is intentionally non-destructive: it re-adds an already-present RR and deletes an unrelated absent RRset. The zone is initially in the post-state already, so the UPDATE may be treated as a no-op success or as a semantic failure on replay/unchanged state. A follow-up QUERY checks that the witness RRset remains unchanged.

Steps.Description: Replay a non-destructive UPDATE against an already-converged zone: add an already-present RR and delete an absent unrelated RRset, with prerequisites that hold in the initial state.

Steps.Name: host1.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the witness RRset remains unchanged after the UPDATE.
